title: Job Opening Category Manager at FabAlley South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at FabAlley South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley South Asia Partners:
FabAlley South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley South Asia Partners!
